mentions.note: Emergency generator maker fell after rallying pre-storm on supply constraints; plummeted 11 points when power outages were lighter than expected. Event-driven, not fundamental.
Transitioned from B2C to B2B AI power-generation play on Encon acquisition; up 72% YTD from $167 to $235; CEO solid; $500M buyback announced. Own it, don't trade it.
Backup generator and home solar play up 34% in February; weak Q4 from light hurricane season but strong 2026 outlook; data center and severe winter weather driving growth.
Data center backlog surged 75% to $700M+ in six weeks; non-binding $600M hyperscaler notice to proceed; generational opportunity in AI infrastructure backup power; capacity expansion >$1B underway.

Strong residential backup generator demand, data center hyperscaler orders robust, but no long-term contract announced disappoints market. Stock down despite better story — macro morass paralyzing sentiment.
Backup energy for data centers in short supply; hyperscaler orders driving stock higher; shortage of energy for data centers real constraint.
Backup power systems; data center demand driving growth and margin expansion.
